Name: Consulting Revenue

Description: Chase checking account used to receive 1099-NEC freelance consulting deposits and track deductible expenses.

Description: Chase HYSA reserve for consulting quarterly estimated taxes.

Description: Outstanding consulting invoices not yet paid.

Description: Outstanding vendor bills — software subscriptions, professional development.

Description: 1Password, JetBrains IDE, Cursor, DataDog personal tier, and other developer tools used for consulting.

Description: Wasatch Trail Alliance board volunteer contributions and REI Coop refund donations.

Name: Owner Equity - Amanda Hayes
Description: Amanda Hayes personal Schedule C consulting equity.

Name: Professional Development
Description: Books, conferences, and courses tied to distributed-systems and Go engineering skill development.

Description: Chase Ink Business credit card for consulting deductible expenses.

Description: Reserve for federal Q4 2026 estimated tax payment on consulting income.

Description: Reserve for Utah state Q4 2026 estimated tax payment.

Description: Standing desk and monitor arm dedicated to the home office consulting workspace.

Description: Wasatch trail nonprofit unreimbursed board expenses tracked for personal charitable-deduction records.
